amdmi3      2009-07-16 02:16:49 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/duff        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Duff is a Unix command-line utility written in C for quickly finding
  duplicates in a given set of files.
  
  WWW: http://duff.sourceforge.net
  
  PR:             136635
  Submitted by:   Jason E. Hale <bsdkaffee@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1121    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/sysutils/duff/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/duff/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/sysutils/duff/pkg-descr (new)
